headline: Accenture Invests in AI Infrastructure Firm
summary: Accenture invested in AI infrastructure firm Iridius, expanding its capabilities beyond consulting to include proprietary AI infrastructure services. The investment positions Accenture to offer end-to-end AI implementation services to healthcare and other enterprise clients, bundling infrastructure with transformation consulting.
so_what: Accenture's investment in AI infrastructure firm Iridius signals big consulting's aggressive push into AI capabilities. Health systems should expect Accenture to package AI infrastructure services with transformation engagements.
original_title: Accenture invests in AI infrastructure firm Iridius
